prompt.description: The main text prompt for generating one image.

style.description: Optional style hint such as anime, product render, or cinematic realism.

size.description: Optional exact runtime size such as 1024x1024 or 1536x1024 when the server route supports it.

aspect_ratio.description: Portable framing hint such as 1:1, 16:9, or 9:16.

notes.description: Optional extra constraints confirmed with the user.
